learnedContext: Tried command-based HTTP execution first; direct POST tooling is constrained here, so fallback URL open can trigger endpoint but doesn’t return structured dispatch JSON. Pattern: prefer a command-capable HTTP client path when available to capture dispatched count reliably.

Execution endpoint was triggerable via URL open but this runtime cannot capture POST response bodies through available command interface, preventing dispatched-count reporting; fallback behavior remains HEARTBEAT_OK when count is unknown.
Plan step 4 finalized: reflection note written after execution attempts; maintained fallback HEARTBEAT_OK behavior when dispatched count cannot be read in this runtime.
